titlestmt.titleproper: School of Hotel Administration. Housing and Feeding the Homeless records28-1-3161
titlestmt.author: Compiled by

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-04-05 18:23:12 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: School of Hotel Administration. Housing and Feeding the Homeless records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Housing and Feeding the Homeless Program

did.abstract: Correspondence, publications, newspaper clippings, scrapbooks and related records pertaining to the Housing and Feeding the Homeless Program that existed in the School of Hotel Administration at Cornell.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, publications, newspaper clippings, scrapbooks and related records pertaining to the Housing and Feeding the Homeless Program that existed in the School of Hotel Administration at Cornell.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Housing and Feeding the Homeless Program, #28-1-3161. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Housing and Feeding the Homeless Program was established in July 1987 and consisted of three components: the Housing and Feeding the Homeless Course; the Industry Linkage Program; and the Research, Resource, and Advocacy Center.

Homeless Table of Contents: Governor Cuomo's Message to the Legislature, January 1984 Editorial-Robert Maroney. The Urban and Social Review. Vol. 17 No. 1 Winter 1984 1933/1983 Never Again: Report of the National Governors Conference Homeless in America (Newsweek) The Homeless of New York (Public Interest) The Plight of Homeless Women, Madeline R. Stoner (Social Service Review) An Analysis of Public and Private Sector Provisions for Homeless People, by Madeline Stoner (The Urban and Social Change Review) Homelessness: A Comprehensive Policy Approach by Nancy K. Kaufman (The Urban and Social Change Review) Legal and Welfare Rights Advocacy: Complimentary Approaches in Organizing on Behalf of the Homeless by Michael Fabricant and Irwin Epstein (The Urban and Social Change Review) The Single Room Occupant Elderly (SRO), Rubenstein, unpublished
